silhouette_language: Classical Greek architecture: tall fluted marble columns with a square plinth base and a Doric capital (round echinus + square abacus), clean carved stone forms.
vision_style_brief: Weathered white Greek marble under an overcast, stormy sky: a fluted Doric column, warm cream stone with thin cool-grey veining and a polished-but-worn surface. Monumental, ancient, dramatic. NOT: shiny plastic, coloured stone, sci-fi or fantasy-glowing materials, low-contrast mud.
anti_style: saturated or coloured stone (must read as white/grey marble)
